compiled_state.title: Remediate shim violations in agents
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: Fix violations in plugins/dso/agents/. Same replace-vs-annotate categorization. tested-by-linter: check-shim-refs.sh.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: No new tests needed — this is a remediation task ✓
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓

Fixes applied to plugins/dso/agents/:
1. complexity-evaluator.md:52 — CONVERTED: python3 plugins/dso/scripts/blast-radius-score.py → .claude/scripts/dso blast-radius-score.py (executable script with shebang, use shim)
2. completion-verifier.md:88 — ANNOTATED: grep -rl search command using plugins/dso/scripts/ as a filesystem discovery path, not script invocation → added # shim-exempt: grep search path, not script invocation

Blocked (generated files, pre-edit hook blocked):
3. code-reviewer-light.md:243 — generated from plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-light.md (owned by task 16a2-59a6)
4. code-reviewer-standard.md:244 — generated from plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-standard.md (owned by task 16a2-59a6)

These 2 remaining violations require the sibling task (16a2-59a6) to fix the source fragments, then rebuild with build-review-agents.sh.
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
CHECKPOINT 5/6: Verification complete ✓

check-shim-refs.sh results after fixes:
- complexity-evaluator.md: CLEAN (was: python3 plugins/dso/scripts/blast-radius-score.py, now: .claude/scripts/dso blast-radius-score.py)
- completion-verifier.md: CLEAN (shim-exempt annotation applied)
- code-reviewer-light.md: 1 violation remains (auto-generated, pre-edit hook blocks direct edit, source in docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-light.md)
- code-reviewer-standard.md: 1 violation remains (auto-generated, pre-edit hook blocks direct edit, source in docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-standard.md)

2 violations fixed. 2 violations blocked (generated files — dependency on task 16a2-59a6).
